data: Interview Preparation - Presenting Ideas Clearly and Confidently
Interview Preparation - Presenting Ideas Clearly and Confidently
Learn how to present ideas clearly and confidently in an interview

message:
Hey! Today we're learning how to present ideas clearly and confidently in an interview.

A structured answer helps you sound organized and professional.
image_url: https://r2-activity-data.gosupernova.live/system-uploads/scenario-data/289f7835-8c67-408b-86f6-c57e20de9684-Interview---Presenting-Ideas-Clearly-and-Confidently.jpg
button_text: Cool!

message:
When you want to present an idea with a clear beginning and conclusion, use this structure:

"To begin with [point] and in conclusion [summary]."

For example: "To begin with remote work saves commute time and in conclusion it improves overall productivity."
image_url: https://r2-activity-data.gosupernova.live/system-uploads/scenario-data/289f7835-8c67-408b-86f6-c57e20de9684-Interview---Presenting-Ideas-Clearly-and-Confidently.jpg
button_text: Got it!

message:
Here's another example.

If the interviewer asks about teamwork, you can say:

"To begin with teamwork builds trust and in conclusion it leads to better results."
image_url: https://r2-activity-data.gosupernova.live/system-uploads/scenario-data/289f7835-8c67-408b-86f6-c57e20de9684-Interview---Presenting-Ideas-Clearly-and-Confidently.jpg
button_text: Next!

message:
This structure helps you present your ideas in a clear and logical way.

It shows the interviewer that you can think and communicate in a structured manner.
image_url: https://r2-activity-data.gosupernova.live/system-uploads/scenario-data/289f7835-8c67-408b-86f6-c57e20de9684-Interview---Presenting-Ideas-Clearly-and-Confidently.jpg
button_text: Makes sense!

message:
Let's practice presenting ideas clearly and confidently!

image_url:
button_text: Start Practice!

Select the correct way to present an idea clearly

1.To begin with digital marketing is cost-effective and in conclusion it reaches a wider audience.
2.Digital marketing is good because it is everywhere these days.

Correct answer: 1

Select the correct way to present an idea about teamwork

1.Teamwork is important. Everyone should work together. That is all.
2.To begin with teamwork builds trust and in conclusion it leads to better results.

Correct answer: 2

first_message: That was incredible! Now we're going to practice by answering few questions in English. Can we start?

'4. The interviewer asks how you handle work pressure. Present your point using the structure.'

'5. The interviewer asks your opinion on teamwork in the workplace. Share your view using the structure.'"
